description_long: This is a large, multi-tiered industrial-style shelving unit with five horizontal shelves supported by a grid of vertical and horizontal beams. The structure is open on all sides, with no visible doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, making it suitable for storing or displaying large items. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear to be made of solid, flat panels, likely metal, supported by a robust frame. The design features some cutouts or gaps in the shelving, possibly for accommodating larger objects or for access. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, typical of storage racks found in warehouses, garages, or urban utility spaces. The color is a uniform gray, giving it a neutral and industrial look.
description: A large, open, industrial shelving unit with five gray metal shelves and a sturdy frame, featuring some cutouts and gaps for versatile storage. Its utilitarian design is ideal for urban or warehouse environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with all five shelves and structural supports clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, unobstructed design with visible shelf cutouts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelves and the supporting frame, with the same open structure as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open sides of the shelving unit.
